---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Nestlancer
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

As a [user/admin/developer], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of the solution you'd like implemented.

## Alternative Approaches

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

1. **Alternative A:** Description
2. **Alternative B:** Description

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Affected Services

- [ ] API Gateway
- [ ] WebSocket Gateway
- [ ] Auth Service
- [ ] Users Service
- [ ] Requests Service
- [ ] Quotes Service
- [ ] Projects Service
- [ ] Progress Service
- [ ] Payments Service
- [ ] Messaging Service
- [ ] Notifications Service
- [ ] Media Service
- [ ] Portfolio Service
- [ ] Blog Service
- [ ] Contact Service
- [ ] Admin Service
- [ ] Webhooks Service
- [ ] Workers (specify which)
- [ ] Shared Libraries
- [ ] Infrastructure

## Estimated Complexity

- [ ] 🟢 Small – Few hours, single service change
- [ ] 🟡 Medium – Few days, multiple service changes
- [ ] 🔴 Large – Week+, architectural changes, new service/worker

## Mockups / Diagrams

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or diagrams to illustrate the feature.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or related issues about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and feature requests
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered alternative approaches
